title: thalictrum bauhini subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Thalictrum bauhini subsp. tenuifolium, also known as the meadow rue, is a flowering plant species in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thalictrum bauhini subsp. tenuifolium include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
